entities.name: KINNOW
entities.description: A citrus fruit crop studied for marketing efficiency and supply chain constraints in Rajasthan

entities.name: AONLA
entities.description: Indian gooseberry, a fruit crop studied for marketing efficiency and supply chain constraints in Rajasthan

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the fruit marketing case study was conducted

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: The Indian state where the study on kinnow and aonla was performed

entities.name: SRIGANGANAGAR
entities.description: A district in Rajasthan with high cultivation area of studied fruit crops

entities.name: JAIPUR
entities.description: A district in Rajasthan with high cultivation area of studied fruit crops

entities.name: MARKETING EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A measure of the effectiveness of the supply chain and marketing channels for fruit crops

entities.name: SUPPLY CHAIN SYSTEMS
entities.description: The network of processes involved in delivering fruit from producers to consumers

entities.name: CARTELISATION
entities.description: The practice of traders colluding to control the market, acting as a major constraint in fruit marketing

entities.name: IMPERFECT MARKET STRUCTURE
entities.description: A market condition that limits farmer power and forces them into unfavorable contracts

entities.name: FORWARD CONTRACT
entities.description: A contract setting a minimum price to protect farmers against possible lower prices at later stages

entities.name: MULTI-FRUIT PROCESSING UNITS
entities.description: Facilities suggested to be established in production areas to improve marketing efficiency

entities.name: EXPORT VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: A proposed system to enhance the marketing and reach of kinnow fruits

entities.name: ORCHARD MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Agricultural practices for which support and incentives are suggested for timely disposal of kinnow

entities.name: MARKETING CHANNELS
entities.description: The various routes through which fruit crops reach the consumer

entities.name: AGRIBUSINESS OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Potential business prospects within the fruit marketing sector
